core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Combine industrial rawness with high-end luxury.
Emotion First: Evoke strength, reliability, and precision.
Content is King: Every scroll tells the story of building dreams.
Zoom In: Focus on textures (concrete, steel, glass).
Negative Space: Use deep black voids to frame content.

rules: Body text must have relaxed line-height.
Use 'Oswald' for numbers/stats to emphasize scale.

layout_strategy.spacing: Generous (2-3x standard). Use 'p-8' to 'p-32' for sections.
layout_strategy.alignment: Left-aligned text for readability, asymmetrical layouts for interest.

visual_enhancers.texture: Subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.03) on all dark backgrounds.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid #333333 with optional 'glow' effect on hover.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Hard shadows or 'glow' shadows for primary elements (e.g., 'shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,107,0,0.3)]').
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Used sparingly for sticky nav and floating controls (backdrop-blur-xl, bg-black/70, border-white/10).

button.style: Sharp edges or minimal rounded (rounded-sm). High contrast.
button.primary: bg-[#FF6B00] text-black hover:bg-[#FF8C00] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
button.secondary: border border-[#333333] text-white hover:border-[#FF6B00] hover:text-[#FF6B00] bg-transparent

card.style: Flat background (#121212), 1px border (#333333). Hover: border-[#FF6B00] transition-colors duration-300.

input.style: bg-[#0A0A0A] border-[#333333] focus:border-[#FF6B00] text-white rounded-none h-12

section_transitions.style: Parallax scroll or sticky revealing sections. Background changes based on scroll position.

assets.icons: lucide-react (Construction, HardHat, Hammer, Blueprint, Building, MapPin, Phone, Mail, ArrowRight)

accessibility.interactive: All buttons must have a focus ring (ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-[#FF6B00]).
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., 'contact-submit-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup: Install 'lenis' for smooth scrolling and 'framer-motion' for animations.
2. Fonts: Import 'Oswald' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts.
3. Theme: Enforce dark mode by default. Add 'dark' class to html/body.
4. Component Customization: Override Shadcn defaults to match the 'Obsidian Industrial' theme (remove rounded corners, increase contrast).
5. Hero Section: Implement a full-screen hero with the 'hero_background' image and a parallax text effect.
6. Services Section: Create a Bento Grid layout using the provided colors.
7. Contact Form: Build a high-contrast form with sharp edges and validation.
8. Footer: massive typography for the brand name.
9. Universal Guidelines: Follow the 'UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT' strictly.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use generic 'on distribution' AI outputs.
Avoid 'Inter' everywhere. Use the specified fonts.
Create depth with z-index and layered elements.
Do not center everything; use asymmetry.
Add micro-interactions to every button and link.
Do not use transparent backgrounds without blur/scrim for text readability.
